name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: In Baltimore, MD, First Cash Pawn at 3517 Eastern Ave offers quick cash loans on valuables with convenient Saturday hours.
description_long:
Located at 3517 Eastern Ave in Baltimore, MD, First Cash Pawn serves the community with convenient access and extended operating hours. The storefront is open Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 6 PM, closed Sundays, making it accessible for weekday workers and weekend shoppers in the Baltimore area. This standalone location provides a straightforward space for pawn transactions.

The Baltimore location specializes in pawning valuables including jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and collectibles in exchange for quick cash advances. You can reach the location directly at 410-732-1133 to inquire about specific items or get a preliminary estimate. Staff can explain terms and help you understand how the pawn transaction works.

For Baltimore residents facing unexpected expenses or looking to liquidate valuables, First Cash Pawn on Eastern Ave offers a quick alternative to traditional lending. Bring a valid government-issued ID and the items you wish to pawn or sell. Walk-ins are welcome during posted business hours.
pros: No credit check required — loan approval based solely on the pledged item's value
Non-recourse loans mean forfeiting collateral does not result in debt collection, lawsuits, or credit damage
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America — among the most accessible lenders in the country
Same-day cash — loans are funded immediately after in-store appraisal, no waiting period
Buys gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash payout
Layaway available on retail purchases with just 10% down
Publicly traded (NASDAQ: FCFS) with SEC oversight — more accountable than independent pawn operators
cons: Pawn loan fees translate to very high effective APRs (commonly 100–300%+), varying by state law
Loan amounts are limited to a fraction of the item's retail value — stores control appraisal offers
Forfeiting unredeemed collateral means permanently losing the item, including sentimental property
No online loan application — must visit a physical store in person
AFF lease-to-own products (through merchant partners) carry their own high costs and are separate from pawn loans
best_for: Consumers with no credit history or damaged credit who need fast cash without a credit check
People with valuable personal property — jewelry, electronics, tools — who need short-term liquidity
Bargain shoppers looking for used merchandise at below-retail prices
Individuals who want to sell gold, silver, or platinum for immediate cash payment
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers who have no credit access and own valuable personal property they can pledge as collateral for a fast, no-questions-asked loan. The key caveat is cost — pawn loan fees are substantially higher than conventional credit products, and items not redeemed within the loan period are permanently forfeited, making this a true last-resort option rather than a routine borrowing strategy.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property
Purchase of used jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Retail sale of used merchandise across all product categories
Gold, silver, and platinum buying for immediate cash
Retail finance/point-of-sale payment solutions through merchant partners (via AFF)
Store locator for 2,500+ North and Latin American locations
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 3517 Eastern Ave, Baltimore, MD. Quick cash loans on valuables.
